result: Validation complete. One minor issue found: MessageLevel and MessageUtil class names appear in the code examples but are missing from the hints array. All other content validation checks passed—no omissions, fabrications, or section structure issues detected.

findings.description: PascalCase class names from code examples are incomplete. The knowledge file content includes code examples that reference MessageLevel and MessageUtil classes, but these are not present in the hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Code examples in sections show: 'MessageUtil.createMessage(MessageLevel.ERROR, ...)' and 'new ApplicationException(MessageUtil.createMessage(MessageLevel.ERROR, ...))' but hints only include 'ApplicationException', not 'MessageLevel' or 'MessageUtil'.
